problem id: ccc42ec2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  01101101 -> 11010110
  11010100 -> 01011101
  01110010 -> 11101111
  01010100 -> 01011101
  11101111 -> 01001110
  00010010 -> 11101111
  10111100 -> 00011011
  11010010 -> 11101101
  00110110 -> 11001111

query: 10000010
predicted answer: 01101011
